triggers.name: Evening actuals update
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Evening update — reconcile today's sprint actuals in the spreadsheet and share a summary with the user.

triggers.name: Next week plan check
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Friday check — review next week's outreach plan in the spreadsheet. Flag any days without prep sheets. Suggest segments to prioritize.

triggers.name: Morning LinkedIn inbox check
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Morning inbox check — Spawn the operator to check Antara's LinkedIn messaging inbox (linkedin.com/messaging/). Report: (1) Any new replies to our DMs, (2) Any new messages from outreach targets, (3) Any connection acceptances. Only look at messages relevant to our outreach — ignore spam/promotions. Do NOT reply to anything — just report findings. Also check if any DMs sent 3-4+ days ago have gone unanswered and flag them for follow-up.

triggers.name: Morning sprint briefing
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Morning briefing — check if today's execution sheet is approved. If yes, remind the user it's ready to sprint. If not, nudge for approval.

triggers.name: Post-sprint summary
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Post-sprint check — if a sprint ran today, summarize results (sent/failed/skipped) and update the spreadsheet actuals.

triggers.name: Biweekly email report
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Biweekly email report — Send a summary email to kagrawal29@gmail.com (TO) and sharma.ack@gmail.com (CC) via Gmail MCP. Include: (1) Total touchpoints this period, category-wise (CRs, DMs, comments, reactions, profile visits, follows), (2) Accepted connections count and names, (3) Reactions/engagement on our activity, (4) Leads in pipeline and their stages, (5) Link to the full tracker sheet, (6) Upcoming plan for next sprint days. Keep it professional and concise.

triggers.name: Daily git push
triggers.message: [SCHEDULED] Daily git push — review all changes made today (git diff, new files, modified configs, sprint-prep sheets, memory updates, code fixes). Stage everything relevant, write a detailed commit message summarizing the day's work (what was done, bugs fixed, configs changed, sprints run, lessons learned). Push to origin/main. Report the commit hash and summary on Slack.
